portfolio

turborepo monorepo housing a next.js 16 portfolio site plus five mixed-stack project case studies — typescript, python, terraform — under one task graph.

next.js 16pnpm 10turborepo 2dokku CDMIT
github.com/yolo-labz/portfolio
pattern
turborepo: apps/web · packages/ui · projects/* mixed-stack
trade-off
pnpm + turbo + biome overhead vs. shared ui + atomic deploy
guardrails
biome 2.x · playwright visual-regression · no-ai-slips lint · SonarCloud
supply chain
SLSA L2 · Sigstore · dual SBOM (CycloneDX 1.7 + SPDX 2.3) · SHA-pinned actions
